content:
I am a Data Policy analyst and a graduate student at the University of Chicago’s Harris School of Public Policy. I am interested in applying machine learning and content analysis techniques to questions related to labor productivity.
Before coming to UChicago, I served as the Head Economist at the Peruvian Institute of Economy. I hold both a Licentiate and a Bachelor in Economics at the Universidad del Pacifico (Peru).
  Download my resumé.
summary: I am a Data Policy analyst and a graduate student at the University of Chicago’s Harris School of Public Policy. I am interested in applying machine learning and content analysis techniques to questions related to labor productivity.
title: Victor Fuentes Campos
Evolution of Poverty in Peru by Regions, 2004 - 2020
